user.title: Gaming Status Setup
user.description:
Enter your SteamGridDB API Key to automatically fetch game cover art. You can get a free key at [SteamGridDB]({api_url}).

**Optional:** You can leave this blank and add a key later via the Configure button.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Gaming Status can be configured.

global_settings.title: Global Settings
global_settings.description: Timing and behavior settings that apply to all players. **Only change these if you understand exactly what they do!**

data_description.grace_period_seconds: How long to wait before marking a player offline. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.away_grace_period_seconds: How long to wait before marking a Steam Away player offline. Default: 600 (10 min)
data_description.game_transition_grace_seconds: Bridges small gaps between game launches so sessions stay continuous. Default: 120 (2 min)
data_description.min_session_duration: Sessions shorter than this are not counted in history. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.reset_history: Clear all accumulated session history when Home Assistant restarts.

manage_players.title: Manage Players
manage_players.description:
{player_count_text}

Select a player below to edit their settings, or select to add a new profile.

add_player.title: Add Player
add_player.description: Provide a name and enter the HA entity IDs for each platform this player uses. Leave blank for platforms they don't have.

edit_player.title: Edit Player | {player_name}
edit_player.description: Update platform entity IDs, or check **Delete this player** to completely remove them.

player_details.title: Player Details | {player_name}
player_details.description: Optional: Configure session notifications, ghost detection, and set per-player game exclusions.

data_description.notify_start_destinations: Select notification method(s) when this player starts gaming.
data_description.notify_end_destinations: Select notification method(s) when this player stops gaming.
data_description.ghosted_by: e.g. sensor.player_two_steam — Hides this player's status from that player's view.
data_description.exclude_games: e.g. Genshin Impact, Minecraft — Games to ignore for this player.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Manage your notifications and weekly report.

add_endpoint.title: Add Notification
add_endpoint.description: Configure a new gaming notification method.

data_description.endpoint_name: A friendly name, e.g. Dad's Phone
data_description.target_id: Required for Discord or SMS (Channel ID / Phone Number).

weekly_report.title: Weekly Report
weekly_report.description: Send a weekly gaming summary to the selected notification methods.

parental_controls.title: Parental Controls
parental_controls.description: Select a player to configure screen time and curfew rules.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Game title overrides, custom cover art, title cleanup strings, and global exclusions. Use simple comma-separated lists!

data_description.title_overrides: Comma-separated key:value pairs mapping raw names to display names. e.g. Minecraft Launcher: Minecraft, Grand Theft Auto V: GTA V
data_description.custom_covers: Comma-separated key:value pairs mapping display names to URLs. e.g. Marvel Rivals: https://..., Minecraft: /local/...
data_description.title_cleanups: Comma-separated strings to strip from game names. e.g. Tom Clancy's, Sid Meier's
data_description.global_exclusions: Comma-separated list of games to ignore across all players. e.g. Home, YouTube, Netflix

error.name_exists: A player with that name already exists.
